meetings.title: Quarterly Business Review - Acme Corp Travel Program
Acme Corp Travel Program — Q2 Follow-up
meetings.source: Parsed from 'Next Meeting' line in m_2026-04-22_acme-qbr notes.

actionItems.description: Send the Q1 savings breakdown deck
actionItems.originalText: Samson Kampler to send the Q1 savings breakdown deck by end of week.
actionItems.dueDateNote: 'by end of week' interpreted as Fri 2026-04-24 (business week ending the meeting week).

actionItems.description: Scope the contractor reporting feature and return with a timeline
actionItems.originalText: Maya Chen will scope the contractor reporting feature and come back with a timeline within two weeks.
actionItems.dueDateNote: 'within two weeks' = meeting date + 14 calendar days.

actionItems.description: Provide the list of UK subsidiary travel admins for onboarding conversations
actionItems.originalText: Tom Larsen to provide the list of UK subsidiary travel admins so we can begin onboarding conversations.
actionItems.dueDateNote: No date in source; default = meeting date + 3 business days.

actionItems.description: Share Acme's current rail booking volume to prioritize Western European expansion
actionItems.originalText: Charlotte Gentry will share Acme's current rail booking volume so we can prioritize Western European expansion.
actionItems.dueDateNote: No date in source; default = meeting date + 3 business days.

actionItems.description: Follow up on integration questions raised about Acme's expense system
actionItems.originalText: Team to follow up on integration questions raised about Acme's expense system.
actionItems.dueDateNote: No date in source; default = meeting date + 3 business days. Owner 'Team' is ambiguous and was flagged.

actionItems.description: Draft three case study video concepts
actionItems.originalText: Derek Smith to draft three case study video concepts by next Friday.
actionItems.dueDateNote: 'by next Friday' said on Thu 2026-04-23. Interpreted as the Friday of the following week (2026-05-01) rather than the next-day Friday (2026-04-24); confirm with reassignment if you meant 2026-04-24.

actionItems.description: Update the proposal bot's confidence scoring logic based on last month's feedback

actionItems.dueDateNote: No date in source; default = meeting date + 3 business days. Owner 'Samson' resolved to 'Samson Kampler' via people.json alias.
